claim: Every domains/<name>/ shall contain a docs/ directory which wraps the generated docs/gen/ plus any hand-written domain material.
why: The docs/ wrapper cleanly separates machine-generated output (docs/gen/) from hand-written domain material without requiring two separate top-level directories. Domain operators need a place to put domain-level notes, ADRs, and glossaries that are domain-specific and not governed by the framework generator. Keeping everything under docs/ mirrors the spec/docs/ structure established for the framework level. ENFORCED 2026-07-13: TestDomainHasDocsDir_RealDomains in internal/invariants/domain_has_docs_dir_test.go mechanically verifies this claim.
